Title: Saimir
Writer: Serena Brugnolo, Dino Gentili, Francesco Munzi
Actors: Xhevdet Ferri, Anna Ferruzzo, Lavinia Guglielman
Plot: Albanian teenager, Saimir, emigrates to Italy to start a new life with his father. His father tries to make a living transporting illegal immigrants. When this fails to make his father any money, he is drawn into an insidious prostitution ring. Saimir helps his father, but a love interest makes him question his life and future.
